source.sourceNote: Standalone affiliate operations source owned by this multi-dashboard repository.

programs.name: Coupang Partners
programs.disclosureNote: Korean economic-interest disclosure must be close to the recommendation/link.
programs.monetizationModel: Product deep links, short links, and display/banner creatives.
programs.payoutModel: CPS; official guide has stated 3% on eligible transaction amount, but verify current category terms before publishing.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Coupang Partners API deeplink endpoint or platform-generated links; do not hand-build tracking URLs.
contentFit: household, beauty, baby, electronics, seasonal deals
complianceNotes: Display the required economic relationship disclosure near Coupang links and banners.
Do not advertise through unregistered channels; Coupang can treat unregistered-channel activity as invalid or abusive activity.
Final approval review starts after cumulative sales reach 150,000 KRW according to the 2026-06-11 guide.
Approval screenshots should show the active link/widget/banner and the disclosure together on the registered channel.
Settlement and Partners API use require final approval.

integrationSupport.api: Coupang Partners API documented, but use only after final approval unless Coupang separately grants early access.
integrationSupport.feed: Use platform-generated links/banners for approval evidence; product/search/goldbox/reco API responses are post-final-approval integration surfaces.
notes: Access Key and Secret Key must stay server-side in local/Vercel environment variables.
Reco impressionUrl must be called only from the user device when the product is actually visible.
Reports are available for clicks, orders, cancels, commission, and ad performance.

programs.nextAction: Run Coupang links/banners only on registered channels with the required disclosure, collect screenshot evidence for final approval, and keep unregistered domains blocked. Enable Partners API after final approval or separate Coupang approval.
programs.notes: 2026-06-11 guide: registered-channel performance can be tracked before final approval; settlement and Partners API use require final approval.

programs.name: Coupang Influencers
programs.monetizationModel: Creator storefront and recommended product links.
programs.payoutModel: Base commission plus time-limited promotions may apply; verify inside program.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Coupang Influencers store/product links generated by the platform.
complianceNotes: Use only approved channels and generated links.
Verify promotion terms before showing bonus rates.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Verify eligibility and whether site-owned channels can use this program.
programs.notes: Good for shopping persona pages after basic Coupang Partners is live.

programs.name: Naver Shopping Connect
programs.monetizationModel: SmartStore creator affiliate links through Brand Connect/Shopping Connect.
programs.payoutModel: Revenue-share set by participating sellers/products; verify each product offer.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Shopping Connect generated links; do not replace seller/product parameters.
contentFit: beauty, living, parenting, food, local shopping
complianceNotes: Product-level terms vary by seller.
Keep recommendation content specific to the product/store being promoted.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Confirm creator/channel eligibility and collect product-level revenue share.
programs.notes: Useful where Naver search or SmartStore intent is high.

programs.name: Naver Brand Connect
programs.monetizationModel: Creator campaign and sponsored partnership flow, separate from open affiliate deep links.
programs.payoutModel: Campaign or negotiated settlement; verify per campaign before publishing.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use campaign-provided links only after approval.
contentFit: Naver Blog, Instagram, YouTube channel campaigns
complianceNotes: Not a general self-serve affiliate network for every owned site.
Each campaign can define channel, wording, and settlement restrictions.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Keep as manual-review campaign source; do not wire as a normal banner affiliate until campaign terms are approved.
programs.notes: Useful for campaign monetization, but should not be mixed with auto banner rotation.

programs.name: Naver Shopping Live Partnership
programs.monetizationModel: Proposal-based live-commerce partnership.
programs.payoutModel: Negotiated per live event or campaign; verify manually.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use approved live-event URLs only.
complianceNotes: Do not present as an open affiliate program.
Remove or expire banners after event end dates.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Treat as proposal-only monetization; create banners only after event approval and date validation.
programs.notes: Manual live-commerce option for event pages, not evergreen affiliate inventory.

programs.name: Naver AdPost
programs.disclosureNote: Ad platform disclosure differs from affiliate endorsement disclosure.
programs.monetizationModel: Naver media ad revenue share, not a normal off-site affiliate program.
programs.payoutModel: Revenue share from ads shown/clicked on eligible Naver media; criteria are controlled by Naver.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Not applicable to this dashboard's banner redirect system.
complianceNotes: Keep separate from affiliate link management.
Eligibility and revenue share are platform-controlled.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Track as a Naver media monetization option, but do not wire into banner redirects.
programs.notes: Included for completeness; not a banner item for owned Next.js/WordPress sites.

programs.name: LinkPrice
programs.disclosureNote: Affiliate/ad disclosure required near promotional content.
programs.monetizationModel: Korean affiliate network for CPS/CPL/CPC merchant campaigns.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by merchant and campaign; verify per offer.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use LinkPrice manual deep-link builder or adbox creatives per approved merchant; do not assume self-serve API access.
contentFit: shopping, travel, finance, education, subscription services
complianceNotes: Merchant terms vary; collect landing URL, allowed media, and prohibited keywords.
Be alert for impersonation/phishing warnings; only use official login/domain.

integrationSupport.api: No self-serve public deeplink API confirmed. LinkPrice markets Open API/deeplink API surfaces, but usable key/endpoint access appears account/1:1-gated.
integrationSupport.feed: Use manual merchant exports, generated ad sources, adboxes, or account-approved files until API access is explicitly confirmed.
notes: Treat LinkPrice as manual deep-link/adbox inventory first.
Only build API ingestion after LinkPrice support confirms endpoint, auth key, rate limits, and allowed site codes.

programs.nextAction: Use manual deep links/adbox tests on high-fit commerce pages; open a 1:1 API access inquiry only after proof of click volume.
programs.notes: Good Korean network layer, but not a confirmed self-serve API provider.

programs.name: Adpick
programs.disclosureNote: Affiliate/ad disclosure required near promotional content.
programs.monetizationModel: Korean campaign, shopping, app-install, CPA/CPI, and content promotion links.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by campaign; verify campaign-level settlement and invalid-conversion rules.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Adpick campaign tracking links or API-provided apTrackingLink values.
complianceNotes: Review each CPA/CPI campaign copy and invalid-conversion conditions.
Do not run sensitive or aggressive claims without manual review.

integrationSupport.api: JSON campaign list API for automatically exposing active campaigns on apps or web services.
integrationSupport.feed: campaign response includes titles, promo text, images, tracking links, caps, and remaining volume
notes: Official guide says API data should be cached to DB/file and called no more than once per minute.

programs.nextAction: Wait for account approval; after approval, confirm API eligibility and build cached campaign ingestion before using in rotation.
programs.notes: Approval is pending. Do not place live Adpick campaigns until account and campaign access are approved.

programs.name: Tenping
programs.monetizationModel: Campaign links generated from Tenping for blog/SNS promotion.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by campaign; verify offer terms before publication.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Tenping generated promotion URL.
complianceNotes: CPA campaigns can carry aggressive claims; review copy manually.
Do not use sensitive offers without legal/policy review.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Use only after campaign compliance review and landing page quality check.
programs.notes: Useful but should be gated behind stricter campaign review.

programs.name: Amazon Associates
programs.disclosureNote: Amazon requires clear associate identification and legally compliant disclosure.
programs.monetizationModel: Product links, Native Shopping Ads, banners, and store/product recommendations.
programs.payoutModel: Category-based standard commission income on qualifying purchases; verify current rate table.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use SiteStripe or Amazon Associates link generator with correct tracking tag.
complianceNotes: Do not cloak or alter Amazon links outside allowed tools.
Display Amazon-required associate disclosure where applicable.
Verify use of images/prices through approved tools/API.

integrationSupport.api: Product Advertising API 5.0; Amazon also points new API use toward Creators API where eligible.
integrationSupport.feed: product data only through approved API/tooling; no public bulk affiliate feed for unrestricted use
notes: Images, prices, and availability should come from approved Amazon tools/API, not scraped pages.

programs.nextAction: Apply with English/global sites and add required Amazon Associate disclosure text.
programs.notes: Best global ecommerce baseline.

programs.name: eBay Partner Network
programs.monetizationModel: Listing/category links, campaigns, and marketplace banners.
programs.payoutModel: Percentage of qualifying transaction GMB by category; caps may apply.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use EPN link generator or API/campaign tools.
complianceNotes: Review rate caps and prohibited traffic.
Avoid misleading discount/voucher claims.

integrationSupport.api: eBay developer APIs can include EPN affiliate parameters and campaign tracking.
integrationSupport.feed: EPN advertises access to feeds and APIs for partner content.
notes: Campaign ID and custom ID should be controlled per site or placement.

programs.nextAction: Apply for global shopping/niche product sites after Amazon/Coupang baseline.
programs.notes: Strong for niche and long-tail commerce articles.

programs.name: Booking.com Affiliate Partner Program
programs.disclosureNote: Affiliate disclosure required near travel recommendations.
programs.monetizationModel: Travel accommodation search boxes, links, widgets, and banners.
programs.payoutModel: Commission on eligible completed travel bookings; exact rate/network terms vary.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Booking.com partner tools or network tracking links.
complianceNotes: Do not claim unavailable discounts.
Use truthful availability/ranking language.

integrationSupport.api: Booking.com Demand API for managed affiliate partners; Transaction Reporting API is available through Booking partnerships.
integrationSupport.feed: widgets/search boxes and API-backed accommodation/travel content
integrationSupport.mcp: developer-docs helper only; no affiliate runtime MCP documented
notes: Demand API is not the same as self-serve affiliate widget access; confirm managed affiliate eligibility first.

programs.nextAction: Use only on travel-intent sites/pages; configure city/deep-link templates per article.
programs.notes: Good match for travel and local guide inventory.

programs.name: impact.com Marketplace
programs.disclosureNote: Affiliate disclosure required; advertiser terms can add wording.
programs.monetizationModel: Brand partnerships, affiliate links, promo assets, and publisher reporting.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser contract.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use impact.com tracking link/deep-link builder per joined advertiser.
complianceNotes: Each advertiser has separate approval and promotional restrictions.
Store advertiser IDs and terms before enabling banners.

integrationSupport.api: impact.com REST API for accounts, campaigns, links, reports, and workflows.
integrationSupport.feed: advertiser assets, reports, and product/catalog data where advertiser grants access
notes: API access depends on impact.com account permissions and joined advertiser terms.

programs.nextAction: Create publisher profile and shortlist brands by site category.
programs.notes: Best global network layer for diverse sites.

programs.name: CJ Affiliate
programs.disclosureNote: Affiliate disclosure required; advertiser terms may add restrictions.
programs.monetizationModel: Publisher network links, brand programs, widgets, and creatives.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use CJ deep links and advertiser creatives after approval.
complianceNotes: Expect advertiser-by-advertiser approval.
Avoid unsupported coupon/voucher claims.

integrationSupport.api: CJ Developer Portal supports publisher/advertiser APIs and reporting workflows.
integrationSupport.feed: product feeds and link/search data depend on advertiser approval
notes: Prepare site descriptions and traffic proof before requesting advertiser/API access.

programs.nextAction: Apply after preparing traffic proof and site category descriptions.
programs.notes: Selective but strong once sites have traffic and clear niches.

programs.name: Awin
programs.monetizationModel: Affiliate links across brand advertisers and publisher reporting.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser; publisher signup advertised as no cost.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Awin link builder per joined advertiser.
complianceNotes: Advertiser terms vary.
Confirm whether each brand supports your country/site.

integrationSupport.api: Awin REST APIs include Link Builder, Offers, Advertiser Performance, and Publisher Performance APIs.
integrationSupport.feed: offers/promotions and advertiser data through API; product feeds depend on advertiser
notes: Awin documents a 20 API calls per minute per user throttle; plan caching.

programs.nextAction: Apply and map advertisers to site categories; treat ShareASale legacy programs under Awin where applicable.
programs.notes: Broad global network for non-Korean programs.

programs.name: Rakuten Advertising
programs.monetizationModel: Publisher network programs and creatives.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Rakuten network tracking tools after approval.
complianceNotes: Advertiser approvals and countries differ.
Collect terms before enabling banners.

integrationSupport.api: Rakuten Advertising affiliate APIs cover advertisers, links, reports, commissions, and product search where available.
integrationSupport.feed: product search/feed style access depends on advertiser and publisher approval
notes: Use after advertiser-specific terms and country eligibility are confirmed.

programs.nextAction: Apply after P0/P1 networks or where a target brand exists only on Rakuten.
programs.notes: Useful for premium brand coverage.

programs.name: PartnerStack Marketplace
programs.monetizationModel: B2B SaaS affiliate/referral marketplace.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by vendor; may include fixed bounty and/or revenue share.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use PartnerStack vendor-specific tracking links.
complianceNotes: Vendor programs can close or pause.
Verify allowed bidding/email/coupon terms.

integrationSupport.api: PartnerStack API exists, but publisher marketplace automation access must be verified per account.
integrationSupport.feed: vendor program assets inside platform; no unrestricted public feed documented
notes: Treat as manual/vendor-specific until account API scope is confirmed.

programs.nextAction: Shortlist SaaS offers that match AI/business/tool sites.
programs.notes: Good for tool-review and AI/software sites.

programs.name: Shopify Affiliate Program
programs.monetizationModel: Referral link for new merchants signing up for paid Shopify plans.
programs.payoutModel: Commission on eligible paid merchant referrals; verify current terms.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Shopify affiliate referral link generated after approval.
complianceNotes: Do not promise income outcomes.
Use current plan/pricing facts only.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Match to seller/ecommerce sites and create tutorial CTAs.
programs.notes: Strong SaaS affiliate for ecommerce education content.

programs.name: HubSpot Affiliate Program
programs.monetizationModel: Referral links for CRM, marketing, sales, and business software audiences.
programs.payoutModel: Public program materials have described 30% recurring commission up to 12 months; verify current terms before publication.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use HubSpot affiliate tracking link generated after approval.
complianceNotes: Do not confuse affiliate program with HubSpot solutions partner status.
Verify current recurring commission and paid-plan eligibility in account terms.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Apply for B2B/software sites and prepare CRM comparison CTAs after approval.
programs.notes: High-value B2B SaaS candidate for CRM and marketing content.

programs.name: Notion Affiliate Program
programs.monetizationModel: Activated signup bounty and first-year revenue share where available.
programs.payoutModel: Official page states up to $50 per activated signup plus 20% of year-one revenue; verify current availability.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use PartnerStack/Notion generated links only.
complianceNotes: Program availability may change.
Do not show payout claims unless verified in current application dashboard.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Verify whether new affiliate applications are open before adding banners.
programs.notes: Good content fit, but gate behind manual availability check.

programs.name: Semrush Affiliate Program
programs.monetizationModel: Tracked links and creatives for SEO software referrals.
programs.payoutModel: Fixed commissions for sale or trial activation; verify current table in Impact/Semrush.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Semrush/Impact tracking links and creatives.
complianceNotes: Keep pricing/features current.
Avoid guaranteed ranking claims.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Map to SEO/content-ops sites and avoid hard ROI promises.
programs.notes: High-intent fit for SEO/operator content.

programs.name: Canva Canvassador / Affiliate
programs.monetizationModel: Affiliate/ambassador referral for design users.
programs.payoutModel: Verify current Canvassador/affiliate rewards after application.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Canva-generated partner links.
complianceNotes: Use approved brand assets only.
Do not publish old commission claims without verification.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Apply where design/creator sites exist; verify current commission and asset rules.
programs.notes: Good for creator and small-business content.

programs.name: Grammarly Affiliates
programs.monetizationModel: Writing assistant referral links and creatives.
programs.payoutModel: Commission structure varies by conversion type and performer tier; verify inside account.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Grammarly affiliate link/creative generated after approval.
complianceNotes: Keep feature claims current.
Avoid representing the product as a replacement for professional advice.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Use on English/AI/productivity sites with tutorial content.
programs.notes: Fast SaaS candidate for English and productivity pages.

programs.name: FlexOffers
programs.monetizationModel: Large affiliate network with promotional feeds, product feeds, reporting, and publisher APIs.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser and network terms.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use FlexOffers advertiser links, deep links, or API-provided creatives after approval.
complianceNotes: Advertiser terms and promotional restrictions vary.
Cache API/feed data and preserve last verified offer timestamp.

integrationSupport.api: Web Services API for promotional feeds, product feeds, reporting, and network data.
integrationSupport.feed: promotional feed and product data feed
notes: Useful if one dashboard ingestion layer should normalize multiple advertiser/network feeds.

programs.nextAction: Apply and test Web Services API with cached promotional feed ingestion.
programs.notes: Strong global network candidate when API-first management matters.

programs.name: Skimlinks
programs.disclosureNote: Affiliate disclosure required; auto-linking must not hide commercial relationship.
programs.monetizationModel: Automated commerce link monetization, merchant discovery, reporting, and link wrapper.
programs.payoutModel: Revenue share varies by merchant/network route.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Skimlinks JavaScript/link wrapper or merchant API workflows where approved.
contentFit: shopping guides where direct advertiser approval is inefficient
complianceNotes: Avoid duplicate monetization with direct programs such as Amazon/Coupang.
Confirm site-level script and privacy requirements before installation.

integrationSupport.api: Merchant API, Reporting API, and link wrapper documented for publishers.
integrationSupport.feed: merchant metadata and reporting data through API
notes: Better for editorial text-link monetization than first-party banner rotation.

programs.nextAction: Evaluate separately from banner console because auto-linking can overlap direct affiliate links.
programs.notes: Useful fallback for merchant coverage gaps, not a primary banner network.

programs.name: Travelpayouts
programs.disclosureNote: Affiliate disclosure required near travel recommendations.
programs.monetizationModel: Travel affiliate network for flights, hotels, transfers, eSIM, tours, and travel widgets.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by travel brand/program.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Travelpayouts partner links API, widgets, white label, or brand-specific tools.
contentFit: eSIM, tours, car rental, and transfer pages
complianceNotes: Travel availability/pricing must be current or clearly dynamic.
Respect API rate limits and brand-specific usage restrictions.

integrationSupport.api: Travelpayouts documents partner links, statistics, balance/payment, Aviasales, and brand APIs.
integrationSupport.feed: multiple brand data feeds including travel planning, tours, eSIM, and destination data where available
notes: API token is required for API/white-label/plugin workflows.

programs.nextAction: Use on travel sites; test partner-link API and one widget before broad feed ingestion.
programs.notes: Best API-friendly travel network layer for multiple travel verticals.

programs.name: GetYourGuide Partner API
programs.monetizationModel: Tours and activities partner links/API integration.
programs.payoutModel: Commission on eligible completed experience bookings; verify current partner terms.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use GetYourGuide partner links or API-provided product/deep-link data after approval.
complianceNotes: Do not show stale availability or unsupported discount claims.
Destination pages should match the promoted experience inventory.

integrationSupport.api: Partner API documentation exists for GetYourGuide integrations.
integrationSupport.feed: experience/product data via API after access approval
notes: Use only on travel pages with destination or activity intent.

programs.nextAction: Apply for travel sites and validate API eligibility before building destination widgets.
programs.notes: Good supplemental travel experiences program.

programs.name: Viator Affiliate / Partner API
programs.monetizationModel: Tours and experiences affiliate links plus commerce/content API partner routes.
programs.payoutModel: Commission on eligible bookings; API/commercial terms depend on partner level.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Viator affiliate links or Partner API endpoints after approval.
complianceNotes: Availability and pricing should be dynamic or explicitly dated.
Booking/payment API flows require stronger QA than redirect-only affiliate links.

integrationSupport.api: Partner API supports product details, pricing, availability, booking, and post-booking workflows for partners.
integrationSupport.feed: product details can be ingested periodically or queried in real time through API
notes: Affiliate link access and commerce API access are different operating modes; do not assume booking API eligibility.

programs.nextAction: Use affiliate links first, then request API level only if travel pages justify custom inventory.
programs.notes: Good API-backed travel experiences candidate after basic travel affiliate pages are live.

programs.name: Klook Affiliate
programs.monetizationModel: Travel activities, tickets, transport, and experiences affiliate links/API.
programs.payoutModel: Commission varies by product and region; verify in Klook affiliate dashboard.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Klook affiliate links, data feeds, API, or white-label tools after approval.
complianceNotes: Do not show expired ticket prices or unsupported availability.
Destination pages must match the promoted product geography.

integrationSupport.api: Klook OpenAPI documentation is published.
integrationSupport.feed: affiliate page advertises data feeds/API/white-label support
notes: Strong APAC travel fit; localize destination and language before broad deployment.

programs.nextAction: Apply and map Klook destinations to travel site clusters.
programs.notes: High practical fit for Korea/APAC travel traffic.

programs.name: Agoda Partners / Demand API
programs.monetizationModel: Hotel/accommodation partner links, widgets, and Demand API integration.
programs.payoutModel: Commission on eligible bookings; verify partner contract.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Agoda partner links/widgets or Demand API results after approval.
complianceNotes: Do not cache prices/availability beyond allowed windows.
Keep hotel rankings truthful and not pay-to-rank unless disclosed.

integrationSupport.api: Agoda Demand API documentation includes JSON search and partner integration workflows.
integrationSupport.feed: accommodation/search content via API after partner approval
notes: Best for accommodation pages where Booking.com coverage or APAC hotel inventory needs a second source.

programs.nextAction: Apply for travel properties and validate whether Demand API access is granted.
programs.notes: Strong APAC accommodation backup to Booking.com.

programs.name: Trip.com Partners
programs.monetizationModel: Hotels, flights, trains, tours, and travel partner integration.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by product and partner contract.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Trip.com partner links or developer API/deep-link tools after approval.
complianceNotes: Treat developer access as contract-gated.
Expire campaign banners when travel deals end.

integrationSupport.api: Trip.com developer portal is available for partner integrations.
integrationSupport.feed: travel product data through partner/developer integration where approved
notes: Good candidate for APAC/global travel pages after managed partner approval.

programs.nextAction: Apply and verify which partner surfaces are available: links, widgets, or API.
programs.notes: Useful travel network where Trip.com inventory matches Korean/APAC traffic.

programs.name: Admitad
programs.monetizationModel: Affiliate network for publisher offers, coupons, deeplinks, and reports.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser/program.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use Admitad publisher links, deeplinks, or API endpoints after approval.
complianceNotes: Advertiser terms vary by country and traffic source.
Review coupon and cashback restrictions before publishing.

integrationSupport.api: Admitad API for Publishers documentation is available through Mitgo developer docs.
integrationSupport.feed: programs, coupons, reports, and related publisher data through API where permitted
notes: Use as secondary global network after Impact/Awin/CJ unless target advertisers are unique.

programs.nextAction: Apply only if target advertiser coverage is better than existing networks.
programs.notes: Good long-tail global network candidate.

programs.name: TradeTracker
programs.monetizationModel: Affiliate network with widgets, product/voucher feeds, reporting, and payment data.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use TradeTracker campaign links/widgets or API-provided product and voucher feeds.
complianceNotes: Voucher feeds need expiry handling.
Merchant-specific terms must be stored before banner activation.

integrationSupport.api: Publisher page documents extensive API functionality for product feeds, voucher feeds, reports, and payment info.
integrationSupport.feed: product and voucher feeds
notes: Consider for EU/global merchant coverage or feed-driven coupon/product pages.

programs.nextAction: Apply if feed-driven shopping pages are prioritized.
programs.notes: Useful network when product/voucher feeds are more important than manual creatives.

programs.name: ClickBank
programs.disclosureNote: Affiliate disclosure required; claims need strict review.
programs.monetizationModel: Digital product affiliate marketplace and API-backed account/order workflows.
programs.payoutModel: Commission varies by product/vendor; verify gravity/refund risk and allowed claims.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Use ClickBank HopLinks generated by the platform; do not hand-build claims pages.
complianceNotes: Many offers can carry health, income, or exaggerated-benefit claims.
Require manual copy, landing page, refund, and evidence review before use.

integrationSupport.api: ClickBank documents APIs for account/order/shipping/ticketing and related workflows.
integrationSupport.feed: marketplace/catalog data availability must be verified in account; no unrestricted public feed assumed
notes: High copy-risk category; keep behind manual review despite API availability.

programs.nextAction: Do not deploy broadly; review product claims, refund risk, and compliance before any banner.
programs.notes: Included for completeness, but keep as manual-review only.

programs.name: RippleAlba
programs.monetizationModel: Captured merchant pool from prior manual input.
programs.payoutModel: Varies by merchant; many offers require policy review.
programs.deepLinkTemplate: Verify inside network before generating any public links.
complianceNotes: Current merchant snapshot contains encoding damage and empty merchant_entries.
Sensitive categories such as finance, legal, health, insurance require strict manual review.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

programs.nextAction: Re-capture merchant list in clean UTF-8 and reject sensitive/high-claim offers before banner use.
programs.notes: Keep as legacy candidate source until clean merchant data is captured.

affiliateItems.title: Amazon Associates monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Category-based standard commission income on qualifying purchases; verify current rate table.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply with English/global sites and add required Amazon Associate disclosure text.

integrationSupport.feed: product data only through approved API/tooling; no public bulk affiliate feed for unrestricted use
notes: Images, prices, and availability should come from approved Amazon tools/API, not scraped pages.

complianceNotes: Do not cloak or alter Amazon links outside allowed tools.
Display Amazon-required associate disclosure where applicable.
Verify use of images/prices through approved tools/API.

affiliateItems.payoutModel: Public program materials have described 30% recurring commission up to 12 months; verify current terms before publication.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Do not confuse affiliate program with HubSpot solutions partner status.
Verify current recurring commission and paid-plan eligibility in account terms.

affiliateItems.title: Grammarly Affiliates monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Commission structure varies by conversion type and performer tier; verify inside account.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Use on English/AI/productivity sites with tutorial content.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Keep feature claims current.
Avoid representing the product as a replacement for professional advice.

affiliateItems.title: Agoda Partners / Demand API monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Commission on eligible bookings; verify partner contract.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply for travel properties and validate whether Demand API access is granted.

integrationSupport.api: Agoda Demand API documentation includes JSON search and partner integration workflows.
integrationSupport.feed: accommodation/search content via API after partner approval
notes: Best for accommodation pages where Booking.com coverage or APAC hotel inventory needs a second source.

complianceNotes: Do not cache prices/availability beyond allowed windows.
Keep hotel rankings truthful and not pay-to-rank unless disclosed.

affiliateItems.title: Awin monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser; publisher signup advertised as no cost.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply and map advertisers to site categories; treat ShareASale legacy programs under Awin where applicable.

integrationSupport.api: Awin REST APIs include Link Builder, Offers, Advertiser Performance, and Publisher Performance APIs.
integrationSupport.feed: offers/promotions and advertiser data through API; product feeds depend on advertiser
notes: Awin documents a 20 API calls per minute per user throttle; plan caching.

complianceNotes: Advertiser terms vary.
Confirm whether each brand supports your country/site.

affiliateItems.title: Booking.com Affiliate Partner Program monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Commission on eligible completed travel bookings; exact rate/network terms vary.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Use only on travel-intent sites/pages; configure city/deep-link templates per article.

integrationSupport.api: Booking.com Demand API for managed affiliate partners; Transaction Reporting API is available through Booking partnerships.
integrationSupport.feed: widgets/search boxes and API-backed accommodation/travel content
integrationSupport.mcp: developer-docs helper only; no affiliate runtime MCP documented
notes: Demand API is not the same as self-serve affiliate widget access; confirm managed affiliate eligibility first.

complianceNotes: Do not claim unavailable discounts.
Use truthful availability/ranking language.

affiliateItems.title: CJ Affiliate monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply after preparing traffic proof and site category descriptions.

integrationSupport.api: CJ Developer Portal supports publisher/advertiser APIs and reporting workflows.
integrationSupport.feed: product feeds and link/search data depend on advertiser approval
notes: Prepare site descriptions and traffic proof before requesting advertiser/API access.

complianceNotes: Expect advertiser-by-advertiser approval.
Avoid unsupported coupon/voucher claims.

affiliateItems.title: Coupang Influencers monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Base commission plus time-limited promotions may apply; verify inside program.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Verify eligibility and whether site-owned channels can use this program.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Use only approved channels and generated links.
Verify promotion terms before showing bonus rates.

affiliateItems.title: eBay Partner Network monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Percentage of qualifying transaction GMB by category; caps may apply.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply for global shopping/niche product sites after Amazon/Coupang baseline.

integrationSupport.api: eBay developer APIs can include EPN affiliate parameters and campaign tracking.
integrationSupport.feed: EPN advertises access to feeds and APIs for partner content.
notes: Campaign ID and custom ID should be controlled per site or placement.

complianceNotes: Review rate caps and prohibited traffic.
Avoid misleading discount/voucher claims.

affiliateItems.title: FlexOffers monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser and network terms.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply and test Web Services API with cached promotional feed ingestion.

integrationSupport.api: Web Services API for promotional feeds, product feeds, reporting, and network data.
integrationSupport.feed: promotional feed and product data feed
notes: Useful if one dashboard ingestion layer should normalize multiple advertiser/network feeds.

complianceNotes: Advertiser terms and promotional restrictions vary.
Cache API/feed data and preserve last verified offer timestamp.

affiliateItems.title: impact.com Marketplace monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser contract.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Create publisher profile and shortlist brands by site category.

integrationSupport.api: impact.com REST API for accounts, campaigns, links, reports, and workflows.
integrationSupport.feed: advertiser assets, reports, and product/catalog data where advertiser grants access
notes: API access depends on impact.com account permissions and joined advertiser terms.

complianceNotes: Each advertiser has separate approval and promotional restrictions.
Store advertiser IDs and terms before enabling banners.

affiliateItems.title: Klook Affiliate monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Commission varies by product and region; verify in Klook affiliate dashboard.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply and map Klook destinations to travel site clusters.

integrationSupport.api: Klook OpenAPI documentation is published.
integrationSupport.feed: affiliate page advertises data feeds/API/white-label support
notes: Strong APAC travel fit; localize destination and language before broad deployment.

complianceNotes: Do not show expired ticket prices or unsupported availability.
Destination pages must match the promoted product geography.

affiliateItems.title: LinkPrice monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by merchant and campaign; verify per offer.
contentFit: shopping, travel, finance, education, subscription services
affiliateItems.nextAction: Use manual deep links/adbox tests on high-fit commerce pages; open a 1:1 API access inquiry only after proof of click volume.

integrationSupport.api: No self-serve public deeplink API confirmed. LinkPrice markets Open API/deeplink API surfaces, but usable key/endpoint access appears account/1:1-gated.
integrationSupport.feed: Use manual merchant exports, generated ad sources, adboxes, or account-approved files until API access is explicitly confirmed.
notes: Treat LinkPrice as manual deep-link/adbox inventory first.
Only build API ingestion after LinkPrice support confirms endpoint, auth key, rate limits, and allowed site codes.

complianceNotes: Merchant terms vary; collect landing URL, allowed media, and prohibited keywords.
Be alert for impersonation/phishing warnings; only use official login/domain.

affiliateItems.title: Naver Shopping Connect monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Revenue-share set by participating sellers/products; verify each product offer.
contentFit: beauty, living, parenting, food, local shopping
affiliateItems.nextAction: Confirm creator/channel eligibility and collect product-level revenue share.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Product-level terms vary by seller.
Keep recommendation content specific to the product/store being promoted.

affiliateItems.title: PartnerStack Marketplace monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by vendor; may include fixed bounty and/or revenue share.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Shortlist SaaS offers that match AI/business/tool sites.

integrationSupport.api: PartnerStack API exists, but publisher marketplace automation access must be verified per account.
integrationSupport.feed: vendor program assets inside platform; no unrestricted public feed documented
notes: Treat as manual/vendor-specific until account API scope is confirmed.

complianceNotes: Vendor programs can close or pause.
Verify allowed bidding/email/coupon terms.

affiliateItems.title: Semrush Affiliate Program monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Fixed commissions for sale or trial activation; verify current table in Impact/Semrush.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Map to SEO/content-ops sites and avoid hard ROI promises.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Keep pricing/features current.
Avoid guaranteed ranking claims.

affiliateItems.title: Shopify Affiliate Program monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Commission on eligible paid merchant referrals; verify current terms.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Match to seller/ecommerce sites and create tutorial CTAs.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Do not promise income outcomes.
Use current plan/pricing facts only.

affiliateItems.title: Travelpayouts monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by travel brand/program.
contentFit: eSIM, tours, car rental, and transfer pages
affiliateItems.nextAction: Use on travel sites; test partner-link API and one widget before broad feed ingestion.

integrationSupport.api: Travelpayouts documents partner links, statistics, balance/payment, Aviasales, and brand APIs.
integrationSupport.feed: multiple brand data feeds including travel planning, tours, eSIM, and destination data where available
notes: API token is required for API/white-label/plugin workflows.

complianceNotes: Travel availability/pricing must be current or clearly dynamic.
Respect API rate limits and brand-specific usage restrictions.

affiliateItems.title: Trip.com Partners monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by product and partner contract.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply and verify which partner surfaces are available: links, widgets, or API.

integrationSupport.api: Trip.com developer portal is available for partner integrations.
integrationSupport.feed: travel product data through partner/developer integration where approved
notes: Good candidate for APAC/global travel pages after managed partner approval.

complianceNotes: Treat developer access as contract-gated.
Expire campaign banners when travel deals end.

affiliateItems.title: Adpick monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by campaign; verify campaign-level settlement and invalid-conversion rules.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Wait for account approval; after approval, confirm API eligibility and build cached campaign ingestion before using in rotation.

integrationSupport.api: JSON campaign list API for automatically exposing active campaigns on apps or web services.
integrationSupport.feed: campaign response includes titles, promo text, images, tracking links, caps, and remaining volume
notes: Official guide says API data should be cached to DB/file and called no more than once per minute.

complianceNotes: Review each CPA/CPI campaign copy and invalid-conversion conditions.
Do not run sensitive or aggressive claims without manual review.

affiliateItems.title: Admitad monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser/program.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply only if target advertiser coverage is better than existing networks.

integrationSupport.api: Admitad API for Publishers documentation is available through Mitgo developer docs.
integrationSupport.feed: programs, coupons, reports, and related publisher data through API where permitted
notes: Use as secondary global network after Impact/Awin/CJ unless target advertisers are unique.

complianceNotes: Advertiser terms vary by country and traffic source.
Review coupon and cashback restrictions before publishing.

affiliateItems.title: Canva Canvassador / Affiliate monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Verify current Canvassador/affiliate rewards after application.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply where design/creator sites exist; verify current commission and asset rules.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Use approved brand assets only.
Do not publish old commission claims without verification.

affiliateItems.title: GetYourGuide Partner API monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Commission on eligible completed experience bookings; verify current partner terms.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply for travel sites and validate API eligibility before building destination widgets.

integrationSupport.api: Partner API documentation exists for GetYourGuide integrations.
integrationSupport.feed: experience/product data via API after access approval
notes: Use only on travel pages with destination or activity intent.

complianceNotes: Do not show stale availability or unsupported discount claims.
Destination pages should match the promoted experience inventory.

affiliateItems.title: Rakuten Advertising monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply after P0/P1 networks or where a target brand exists only on Rakuten.

integrationSupport.api: Rakuten Advertising affiliate APIs cover advertisers, links, reports, commissions, and product search where available.
integrationSupport.feed: product search/feed style access depends on advertiser and publisher approval
notes: Use after advertiser-specific terms and country eligibility are confirmed.

complianceNotes: Advertiser approvals and countries differ.
Collect terms before enabling banners.

affiliateItems.title: Skimlinks monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Revenue share varies by merchant/network route.
contentFit: shopping guides where direct advertiser approval is inefficient
affiliateItems.nextAction: Evaluate separately from banner console because auto-linking can overlap direct affiliate links.

integrationSupport.api: Merchant API, Reporting API, and link wrapper documented for publishers.
integrationSupport.feed: merchant metadata and reporting data through API
notes: Better for editorial text-link monetization than first-party banner rotation.

complianceNotes: Avoid duplicate monetization with direct programs such as Amazon/Coupang.
Confirm site-level script and privacy requirements before installation.

affiliateItems.title: TradeTracker monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by advertiser.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Apply if feed-driven shopping pages are prioritized.

integrationSupport.api: Publisher page documents extensive API functionality for product feeds, voucher feeds, reports, and payment info.
integrationSupport.feed: product and voucher feeds
notes: Consider for EU/global merchant coverage or feed-driven coupon/product pages.

complianceNotes: Voucher feeds need expiry handling.
Merchant-specific terms must be stored before banner activation.

affiliateItems.title: Viator Affiliate / Partner API monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Commission on eligible bookings; API/commercial terms depend on partner level.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Use affiliate links first, then request API level only if travel pages justify custom inventory.

integrationSupport.api: Partner API supports product details, pricing, availability, booking, and post-booking workflows for partners.
integrationSupport.feed: product details can be ingested periodically or queried in real time through API
notes: Affiliate link access and commerce API access are different operating modes; do not assume booking API eligibility.

complianceNotes: Availability and pricing should be dynamic or explicitly dated.
Booking/payment API flows require stronger QA than redirect-only affiliate links.

affiliateItems.title: Notion Affiliate Program monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Official page states up to $50 per activated signup plus 20% of year-one revenue; verify current availability.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Verify whether new affiliate applications are open before adding banners.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Program availability may change.
Do not show payout claims unless verified in current application dashboard.

affiliateItems.title: Tenping monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by campaign; verify offer terms before publication.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Use only after campaign compliance review and landing page quality check.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: CPA campaigns can carry aggressive claims; review copy manually.
Do not use sensitive offers without legal/policy review.

affiliateItems.title: ClickBank monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Commission varies by product/vendor; verify gravity/refund risk and allowed claims.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Do not deploy broadly; review product claims, refund risk, and compliance before any banner.

integrationSupport.api: ClickBank documents APIs for account/order/shipping/ticketing and related workflows.
integrationSupport.feed: marketplace/catalog data availability must be verified in account; no unrestricted public feed assumed
notes: High copy-risk category; keep behind manual review despite API availability.

complianceNotes: Many offers can carry health, income, or exaggerated-benefit claims.
Require manual copy, landing page, refund, and evidence review before use.

affiliateItems.title: Naver AdPost monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Revenue share from ads shown/clicked on eligible Naver media; criteria are controlled by Naver.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Track as a Naver media monetization option, but do not wire into banner redirects.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Keep separate from affiliate link management.
Eligibility and revenue share are platform-controlled.

affiliateItems.title: Naver Brand Connect monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Campaign or negotiated settlement; verify per campaign before publishing.
contentFit: Naver Blog, Instagram, YouTube channel campaigns
affiliateItems.nextAction: Keep as manual-review campaign source; do not wire as a normal banner affiliate until campaign terms are approved.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Not a general self-serve affiliate network for every owned site.
Each campaign can define channel, wording, and settlement restrictions.

affiliateItems.title: Naver Shopping Live Partnership monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Negotiated per live event or campaign; verify manually.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Treat as proposal-only monetization; create banners only after event approval and date validation.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Do not present as an open affiliate program.
Remove or expire banners after event end dates.

affiliateItems.title: RippleAlba monetization item
affiliateItems.payoutModel: Varies by merchant; many offers require policy review.
affiliateItems.nextAction: Re-capture merchant list in clean UTF-8 and reject sensitive/high-claim offers before banner use.

integrationSupport.api: none documented
integrationSupport.feed: none documented

complianceNotes: Current merchant snapshot contains encoding damage and empty merchant_entries.
Sensitive categories such as finance, legal, health, insurance require strict manual review.

playbook.disclosureTemplateKo: 이 글에는 제휴 링크가 포함될 수 있으며, 링크를 통한 구매 또는 가입 시 일정액의 수수료를 받을 수 있습니다.
playbook.disclosureTemplateEn: This content contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission when you buy or sign up through these links.

bannerSlotStrategy.purpose: Comparison/review articles after the first useful answer.
bannerSlotStrategy.fit: Coupang, Amazon, eBay, Booking, SaaS trials

bannerSlotStrategy.purpose: Evergreen tools and marketplace offers on desktop.
bannerSlotStrategy.fit: SaaS, affiliate networks, shopping category offers

bannerSlotStrategy.purpose: Decision-stage CTA after the article has answered intent.
bannerSlotStrategy.fit: High-intent product, travel, software, finance-safe lead offers

bannerSlotStrategy.purpose: Low-height mobile placement for strong single offer.
bannerSlotStrategy.fit: Coupang, Naver Shopping Connect, Amazon, Grammarly

priorityRules.rule: Start with programs that match broad site inventory, allow links/banners, and have clear public onboarding.
Use selective networks after site category pages, disclosure, and traffic proof are ready.
Do not deploy until commission, approval status, and promotional restrictions are verified inside the account.

highValueCandidates.name: 인공관절직업병보상센터
highValueCandidates.priorityNote: 최고 단가지만 산출불가라 정책·전환 리스크 검토 필요.

highValueCandidates.name: 미즈케어 솔루션
highValueCandidates.priorityNote: 고단가 반복 상품군. 승인율 정보가 없거나 낮은 변형이 있어 검증 필요.

highValueCandidates.name: 부장검사 출신 개인회생 법률사무소 청하 2
highValueCandidates.priorityNote: 법률 고단가 후보. 승인율은 중간 수준.

highValueCandidates.name: 삼성제약 혈당+눈건강 솔루션 골드 2-4
highValueCandidates.priorityNote: 고단가와 높은 승인율을 모두 가진 우선 검토 후보.

highValueCandidates.name: 삼성제약 혈당+눈건강 솔루션 골드 2-1
highValueCandidates.priorityNote: 고단가와 높은 승인율을 모두 가진 우선 검토 후보.

highValueCandidates.name: 주식자금대출 하이스탁론
highValueCandidates.priorityNote: 금융 고단가 후보. 정책 리스크 검토 필요.

highValueCandidates.name: 국내해외ETF 주식담보대출 올타임스탁론
highValueCandidates.priorityNote: 금융 고단가 후보. 정책 리스크 검토 필요.

highValueCandidates.name: 법무법인 서앤율
highValueCandidates.priorityNote: 고단가와 높은 승인율을 모두 가진 우선 검토 후보.

currentCaptureSummary.status: 사용자가 리플알바 머천트 목록 제공을 종료함.
currentCaptureSummary.next_action: 이번 입력분을 기준으로 고단가, 고승인율, 고신청률, 정책리스크별 실행 후보를 선정한다.
currentCaptureSummary.captured_scope_note: 리플알바 전체 390개 머천트 중 사용자가 대화로 제공한 목록 스냅샷. 일부 상품은 반복 노출되었고 일부 지표는 산출불가 또는 0으로 제공됨.

priorityRules.rule: 전월승인율 80% 이상이면 승인 안정 후보로 분류한다.
전월신청률 5% 이상이면 수요 신호가 있는 후보로 분류한다.
산출불가 항목은 신규/저표본 후보로 보고 단가와 카테고리 적합성만 우선 평가한다.
대출/금융, 보험/상조, 개인회생/법률, 건강/다이어트는 과장 표현과 정책 리스크를 별도 검토한다.
